# Explicit translation drops (field paths relative to ingress wire).
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines ignored.
# Update this file in the same PR as fidelity work that starts preserving a field.

# Multi-choice (policy: n=1 only; n>1 rejected before translate)
openai.n>1
google.generation_config.candidate_count>1

# Sampling / determinism extras not yet modeled in canonical
openai.logprobs
openai.top_logprobs
openai.seed
openai.frequency_penalty
openai.presence_penalty
openai.logit_bias
openai.response_format

# Anthropic prompt caching breakpoints — passthrough only (#41 Option B)
anthropic.system[].cache_control
anthropic.messages[].content[].cache_control
anthropic.tools[].cache_control

# OpenAI stream options not rebuilt on non-OpenAI egress
openai.stream_options

# Vendor-specific metadata dropped cross-family
openai.user
